productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Casual Beige Casual Shoes
description: An eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain a cult status. Made with a canvas, suede and synthetic leather upper, this is a must-have in your casual wardrobe.UpperCanvas upper with suede side midfoot panels and synthetic leather overlays for absolute breathable comfortHigh ankle for better support to the lower legCanvas tongue and padded collar with a fabric inner lining for sweat-free comfortCushioned footbed with a fabric lining for sweat-free comfort and impact-protectionLace-up system for a snug, customised FitMidsoleEVA midsole for absolute impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with strategically placed grooves on the forefoot, midfoot and back heel for absolute grip and tractionShoe careClean the suede patches using a suede brushTo clean the canvas, make a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water. Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush. Wash off with lukewarm water.
